Off Calendar Jan-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S Motion To Consolidate Actions (#478418 & #479464).
APPEARANCES: Colin H. Jewell, Esq. of Walsworth, Franklin, Bevins & McCall, LLP 781-7072 for deft & moving party, & specially appearing for CCSF; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court modified its tentative ruling and granted the motion to consolidate for all purposes per stipulation. Lead case number is 478418. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
